plugins.prepareCmd: node scripts/update-manifest.js ${nextRelease.version} && mkdir -p dist && zip -r dist/akamai-debug-helper-${nextRelease.version}-firefox.zip background.js manifest.json popup icons && zip -r dist/akamai-debug-helper-${nextRelease.version}-chrome.zip background.js manifest.chrome.json popup icons && cd dist && unzip -o akamai-debug-helper-${nextRelease.version}-chrome.zip -d chrome-temp && mv chrome-temp/manifest.chrome.json chrome-temp/manifest.json && cd chrome-temp && zip -r ../akamai-debug-helper-${nextRelease.version}-chrome.zip . && cd .. && rm -rf chrome-temp
